title: Remove gray merge field boxes on Monday doc in PDF export

posts.author: Parke (Parke Brown)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve enjoyed using Monday doc templates to create creative briefs using forms and columns to populate them.

I sometimes need to circulate those documents for digital signatures, which works well with PDF exports.

I would prefer if the merge fields were not surrounded by a gray box when the PDF export is created. It is unsightly and raises unnecessary questions by reviewers who don’t need to focus on the merge.
